title: rubus × planicaulis
intro: Rubus × planicaulis, also known as the hybrid black raspberry or Himalayan black raspberry, is a hybrid plant that is a cross between the Himalayan black raspberry (Rubus armeniacus) and the North American black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis). The plant is rich in anthocyanins, powerful antioxidants that have been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus × planicaulis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
